description:
Our normal delivery time is 1-3 working days, which is not 100% guaranteed. The normal delivery time is about one week. Due to some uncontrollable reasons, if the logistics are not updated in time, please contact us. After the order number is uploaded, we do not accept refunds due to the lack of updates in logistics. If it has not been updated for more than 7 days, you can apply for a dispute. We will deal with it according to the actual situation. We do not accept orders from platforms such as Tiktok shop，TEMU, eBay, etc.

Overview:
Come with this 2-In-1 space-saving cup holder, you can put two drinks on it or store your credit cards, keys, pens, etc. in it, which can save you countless time to find them. The 360° rotatable base of the upper cup holder allows you to adjust it to any angle to reach your drink conveniently. A must-have to save your car space Most importantly, you don't have to worry about messing up your car, because once you place the items into the holder, they will stay firmly even during the most dangerous driving conditions..

Features:
2-In-1 Space-Saving Design: Equipped with two storage cups by adjusting the rotatable base, it can hold two drinks at the same time, saving car space.
Extendable Upper Cup Mouth: Upper cup holder works best with bottles/cups 3.0in-5.9in diameter, and fits for most 20 oz water bottles. And the bottom cup holder is suitable for bottles/cups under 2.8in diameter.
360° Rotatable Base: The base of the upper cup holder can rotate 360° freely, so that you can adjust it according to the space of your car body, to reach your drink conveniently and get the most comfortable experience. Besides, it’s able to hold 2 bottles of drink with this rotatable design.
Safe Driving: You can also store your credit cards, money, keys, coins, pens, wallet, etc. in the cup holder so that you will never lose your items in the car and save you countless time to find them. Make your driving safer and happier.

Note:
Not recommend placing your phone in this organizer.

Specifications:
Product Type: 2 In 1 Car Dual Cup Holder
Color: Black
Material: ABS
Applicable Part: Medium Control Chair Seat
Adjustable Upper Cup Holder Mouth Diameter: 7.4-15cm/2.9-5.9in
Lower Cup Holder Mouth Diameter: 7.3cm/2.87in
Item Size: 18.6x12x9cm/7.32x4.72x3.54in
Item Weight: 205g/0.45lbs
Package Size: 19x11.5x8.5cm/7.48x4.53x3.35in
Package Weight: 262g/0.58lbs

Package Contents:
1 x 2 In 1 Car Dual Cup Holder
